title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can navigate through the three onboarding screens by swiping left/right or tapping the Continue button.
steps: 1. Launch the app for the first time after installation.
2. Observe the first onboarding screen titled 'Organized'.
4. Observe the second onboarding screen titled 'Up-to-Date'.
6. Observe the third onboarding screen titled 'Personal'.
7. Swipe right to navigate back to the second screen.
8. Swipe right again to navigate back to the first screen.
expected: User can scroll left and right through all three onboarding screens ("Organized", "Up-to-Date", "Personal") by swiping or tapping the "Continue" button.
